result.stdout:
Usage: dotnet csproj --get <KEY> [PATH_TO_CSPROJ]
       dotnet csproj --set <KEY>="<VALUE>" [PATH_TO_CSPROJ]

ABOUT
This tool allows you to easily set and get csproj xml values.

PLACEHOLDERS
The following placeholders can be used when setting a value:
#&VALUE  -> The current value of the element.

KEYS
To make life a little easier the following keys are available to set and get:

-Authors
-Company
-Description
-Copyright
-Version
-AssemblyVersion
-FileVersion
-PackageTags
